title: SpacePvP
description: Unique plugin for battles using /pvp or custom cabins.
body:
[![Support me](https://i.imgur.com/g8Ob1Go.png)](https://ko-fi.com/klaidi4) ![welcome](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/493d45a737e8ba2941692f66b6dd2b3ac05e9a07.png) --- ## ✨ Feature List ✨ - ✅ PvP Mode — Compatible with AntiRelog, CombatLogX, and other plugins - ✅ Regions — WorldGuard & Towny support (prevents teleporting into protected regions) - ✅ GUI — Custom menus with ItemsAdder, Oraxen or Nexo - ✅ Configuration — Easy configuration of all features - ✅ Statistics — Tracks wins, losses, win streaks, and more - ✅ Regeneration — WorldEdit & FastAsyncWorldEdit support for fast arena regeneration - ✅ Two queue modes: - Arena (preset battleground) - Random Location (random area) - ✅ SQLite & MySQL support - ✅ Effects applied after teleport - ✅ Enables PvP mode (compatible with most plugins) - ✅ Broadcast message when joining queue (randomizable) - ✅ Broadcast message when winning (randomizable) - ✅ Teleport delay with visible timer (Title / ActionBar / BossBar) - ✅ Random location validation (WorldGuard & Towny) - ✅ Arena availability check before starting battle - ✅ Arena regeneration (restoring previous state) - ✅ Disable Fly / God / Vanish / Gamemode on teleport (Essentials & CMI support) - ✅ PlaceholderAPI support - ✅ View opponent inventory before battle - ✅ Cancel teleport on damage (configurable damage causes) - ✅ Required armor check before queue join - ✅ Rewards for a certain number of wins or losses - ✅ Unique points system - ✅ Convenient player sorting in queue - ✅ Auto-updating queue list - ✅ PvP cabin system - ✅ Kit system - ✅ Discord Webhooks support - ✅ Item-based access restrictions for queues and cabins - ✅ Cross-server battles support - ✅ Developer API — https://github.com/klaidi4dev/SpacePvP-API - ✅ Official Addon — https://modrinth.com/plugin/spaceduel - ✅ Color support: ``` Legacy: &7text HEX: ʊdbdtext MiniMessage examples: Example text Gradient text ``` --- ## 🧾 Commands
👤 User Commands - `/pvp` - Open the PvP menu - `/pvp help` - Show help message - `/pvp list` - View ongoing PvP duels - `/pvp lobby` - Teleport to lobby - `/pvp party` - Open party management help
👮 Admin Commands - `/spacepvp arena` - Manage arenas - `/spacepvp teamarena` - Manage team arenas - `/spacepvp cabins` - Manage cabins - `/spacepvp gladiators` - Manage gladiator event - `/spacepvp kit` - Manage kits - `/spacepvp points` - Manage points - `/spacepvp ban/unban` - Manage bans - `/spacepvp party forceignore` - Toggle party invite ignore for a player - `/spacepvp customitems` - Manage custom items - `/spacepvp backup` - Manage backups - `/spacepvp setlobby` - Set main lobby - `/spacepvp reload` - Reload config
👥 Party Commands - `/pvp party invite ` - Invite a player to your party - `/pvp party accept [player]` - Accept a pending invite - `/pvp party deny [player]` - Deny a pending invite - `/pvp party list` - Show party members - `/pvp party leave` - Leave your current party - `/pvp party ignore` - Toggle party invite ignoring - `/pvp party kick ` - Kick a player (Leader only) - `/pvp party leader ` - Transfer leadership - `/pvp party disband` - Disband the party (Leader only)
⭐ Points Commands - `/spacepvp points give ` - Give points to a player - `/spacepvp points set ` - Set player points - `/spacepvp points take ` - Take points from a player - `/spacepvp points check ` - Check points
⚔️ Arena Commands - `/spacepvp arena create ` - Create new arena - `/spacepvp arena remove ` - Delete arena - `/spacepvp arena pos1 ` - Set first position - `/spacepvp arena pos2 ` - Set second position - `/spacepvp arena posplayer1 ` - Set player1 spawn - `/spacepvp arena posplayer2 ` - Set player2 spawn - `/spacepvp arena center ` - Set arena center - `/spacepvp arena confirm ` - Confirm arena setup - `/spacepvp arena saveschem ` - Save arena schematic - `/spacepvp arena regen ` - Regenerate arena - `/spacepvp arena teleport ` - Teleport to arena - `/spacepvp arena list [page]` - List all arenas - `/spacepvp arena setlobby` - Set arena lobby - `/spacepvp arena removelobby` - Remove arena lobby - `/spacepvp arena lobby` - Teleport to arena lobby - `/spacepvp arena setdisplayname ` - Set display name - `/spacepvp arena removedisplayname ` - Remove display name
🤝 Team Arena Commands - `/spacepvp teamarena create ` - Create new team arena - `/spacepvp teamarena remove ` - Delete arena - `/spacepvp teamarena pos1 ` - Set first position - `/spacepvp teamarena pos2 ` - Set second position - `/spacepvp teamarena setspawn team1` - Set Team 1 spawn - `/spacepvp teamarena setspawn team2` - Set Team 2 spawn - `/spacepvp teamarena center ` - Set arena center - `/spacepvp teamarena formats <2x2,3x3>` - Set supported formats - `/spacepvp teamarena confirm ` - Confirm arena setup - `/spacepvp teamarena saveschem ` - Save schematic - `/spacepvp teamarena regen ` - Regenerate arena - `/spacepvp teamarena teleport ` - Teleport to arena - `/spacepvp teamarena list [page]` - List all team arenas - `/spacepvp teamarena setlobby` - Set team arena lobby - `/spacepvp teamarena removelobby` - Remove team arena lobby - `/spacepvp teamarena lobby` - Teleport to team arena lobby - `/spacepvp teamarena setdisplayname ` - Set display name - `/spacepvp teamarena removedisplayname ` - Remove display name
🏠 Cabins Commands - `/spacepvp cabins create ` - Create new cabin - `/spacepvp cabins pos1 ` - Set first position - `/spacepvp cabins pos2 ` - Set second position - `/spacepvp cabins center ` - Set cabin center - `/spacepvp cabins adddoor ` - Add a door - `/spacepvp cabins removedoor ` - Remove a door - `/spacepvp cabins confirm ` - Confirm setup - `/spacepvp cabins teleport ` - Teleport to cabin - `/spacepvp cabins list [page]` - List cabins - `/spacepvp cabins load ` - Load cabin - `/spacepvp cabins unload ` - Unload cabin - `/spacepvp cabins remove ` - Delete cabin - `/spacepvp cabins setlobby` - Set cabins lobby - `/spacepvp cabins removelobby` - Remove cabins lobby - `/spacepvp cabins lobby` - Teleport to cabins lobby - `/spacepvp cabins setdisplayname ` - Set display name - `/spacepvp cabins removedisplayname ` - Remove display name
📦 Kit Commands - `/spacepvp kit create ` - Start kit creation - `/spacepvp kit confirm ` - Confirm creation/modification - `/spacepvp kit give [player]` - Give kit - `/spacepvp kit edit ` - Edit kit - `/spacepvp kit remove ` - Delete kit - `/spacepvp kit list` - List kits - `/spacepvp kit connect arena ` - Link kit to arena - `/spacepvp kit connect cabin ` - Link kit to cabin - `/spacepvp kit disconnect arena ` - Unlink from arena - `/spacepvp kit disconnect cabin ` - Unlink from cabin
🛡️ Gladiators Commands - `/spacepvp gladiators start` - Force start event - `/spacepvp gladiators stop` - Force stop event - `/spacepvp gladiators create ` - Create arena - `/spacepvp gladiators remove ` - Delete arena - `/spacepvp gladiators pos1 ` - Set first position - `/spacepvp gladiators pos2 ` - Set second position - `/spacepvp gladiators addplayerpos ` - Add spawn point - `/spacepvp gladiators removeplayerpos ` - Remove spawn point - `/spacepvp gladiators center ` - Set arena center - `/spacepvp gladiators confirm ` - Confirm setup - `/spacepvp gladiators saveschem ` - Save schematic - `/spacepvp gladiators regen ` - Regenerate arena - `/spacepvp gladiators teleport ` - Teleport to arena - `/spacepvp gladiators list [page]` - List arenas - `/spacepvp gladiators setlobby` - Set event lobby - `/spacepvp gladiators lobby` - Teleport to event lobby - `/spacepvp gladiators setdisplayname ` - Set display name - `/spacepvp gladiators removedisplayname ` - Remove display name
💎 CustomItems Commands - `/spacepvp customitems add ` - Save held item - `/spacepvp customitems remove ` - Remove custom item - `/spacepvp customitems give [player] [amount]` - Give custom item
🚫 Ban Commands - `/spacepvp ban [time] [reason] [-s]` - Ban player - `/spacepvp ipban [time] [reason] [-s]` - IP ban player - `/spacepvp unban [-s]` - Unban player - `/spacepvp checkban ` - Check bans
--- ## 🔌 Dependencies Soft Dependencies: - PlaceholderAPI - LuckPerms - WorldGuard - Towny - EssentialsX - CMI - ViaVersion - HeadDatabase - Skulls Required Dependencies: - WorldEdit - FastAsyncWorldEdit --- ## 🧩 Placeholders ### General Stats - `%spacepvp_wins%` - `%spacepvp_losses%` - `%spacepvp_kd_ratio%` - `%spacepvp_total_games%` - `%spacepvp_points%` ### Team PvP Stats - `%spacepvp_team_wins%` - `%spacepvp_team_losses%` - `%spacepvp_team_kd_ratio%` ### Player State - `%spacepvp_in_fight%` — general check if player is in any fight - `%spacepvp_in_arena%` - `%spacepvp_in_cabin%` - `%spacepvp_in_default%` - `%spacepvp_in_team%` ### Queue Info - `%spacepvp_count_queue%` — total players in all queues - `%spacepvp_count_queue_random%` - `%spacepvp_count_queue_arena%` - `%spacepvp_count_queue_team%` ### Active Fights - `%spacepvp_playing_cabin%` — players fighting in cabins - `%spacepvp_playing_arena%` — players fighting in arenas ### Arenas / Cabins specific - `%spacepvp_arena_displayname_%` - `%spacepvp_arena_status_%` - `%spacepvp_teamarena_displayname_%` - `%spacepvp_teamarena_status_%` - `%spacepvp_cabin_displayname_%` - `%spacepvp_cabin_status_%` - `%spacepvp_cabin_last_result_%` ### Gladiators - `%spacepvp_gladiators_next_start%` - `%spacepvp_gladiators_next_start_LONG%` - `%spacepvp_gladiators_next_start_SHORT%` - `%spacepvp_gladiators_next_start_{minutes}:{seconds}%` - `%spacepvp_gladiators_last_winner_prefix%` - `%spacepvp_gladiators_last_winner_name%` - `%spacepvp_gladiators_last_winner_displayname%` - `%spacepvp_gladiators_wins%` - `%spacepvp_gladiators_last_kills%` - `%spacepvp_gladiators_kills%` --- ## 🔐 Permissions ```yaml spacepvp.admin # Global bypass spacepvp.command.pvp spacepvp.command.spacepvp spacepvp.command.help spacepvp.command.reload spacepvp.command.list spacepvp.command.points spacepvp.command.arena spacepvp.command.teamarena spacepvp.command.party.forceignore spacepvp.command.gladiators spacepvp.command.cabins spacepvp.command.kit spacepvp.command.customitems spacepvp.command.setlobby spacepvp.command.lobby spacepvp.command.ban spacepvp.command.ipban spacepvp.command.unban spacepvp.command.checkban spacepvp.inventory.preview spacepvp.server.teleport spacepvp.playtime.bypass spacepvp.cabins.playtime.bypass spacepvp.cabins.commands.bypass spacepvp.arena.commands.bypass spacepvp.gladiators.commands.bypass spacepvp.queue.randomlocation spacepvp.queue.arena spacepvp.queue.team ``` --- ## 🎥 Setup Guides ### Arena Setup ### Cabins Setup --- ## 🖼️ Screenshots ![screen1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e8b538ec8cd9f105ff115245132fd5d9b3fcd0a_0.webp) ![screen2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e8a947e8232028329d3a393e81af5523e092982_0.webp) ![screen3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/88d45ed7d9a48bbf3bdeb93cc3741c70e71fafd2_0.webp) ![screen4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/146754f47d90209c3fa8ea770de75a72b6df6352_0.webp) ![screen5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb6a6750855b0cd513efdd420af83081e8532ba2_0.webp) ![screen6](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c5d0004d63a49ed51c1ccf145b0e636a938d4df_0.webp) ![screen7](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/765cf0208e98b8020bc8eb4fa9b98a00e2a6450a_0.webp) ![screen8](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e6067b7cbe0b940d07e6a79890920ce0d0304c4_0.webp) ![screen9](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/80fb7bcb5eddf501651104084f49ed052b67e163_0.webp)
